title: TiDB can specify table which will be updated in the FROM clause
poc: DELETE FROM t1 WHERE id = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1);
key_bug_features: Specifying target table in FROM clause during update
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
DELETE FROM t2 WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM t2 WHERE age < 35);
CREATE TABLE t3 (id INT, value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT NULL);
